program_name: Florida Property Tax Exemption for Solar / Renewable Energy (Statute 196.175)
description: Renewable energy source devices installed on real property are exempt from being considered when determining the assessed value for property taxes.
eligibility_criteria: Owner-occupied required | Eligible projects: biomass, geothermal, solar_pv, solar_water_heating, wind | Applies to renewable energy source devices installed on or after January 1, 2013, for residential property and on or after January 1, 2018, for non-residential. Filed with the local property appraiser. | Administered by: Florida Department of Revenue

program_name: Florida Sales Tax Exemption on Solar Energy Systems (Statute 212.08(7)(hh))
description: Sales of solar energy systems and components are exempt from Florida sales and use tax.
eligibility_criteria: Eligible projects: solar_pv, solar_water_heating | Applies to equipment certified by the Florida Solar Energy Center (FSEC). Buyer submits exemption certificate to seller. | Administered by: Florida Department of Revenue

program_name: My Safe Florida Home Hurricane Mitigation Grant
description: State-funded hurricane mitigation grant for owner-occupied single-family homes in Florida. Provides a free wind mitigation inspection and a matching grant for approved improvements.
eligibility_criteria: Owner-occupied required | Eligible projects: impact_doors, impact_windows, opening_protection, roof_strengthening, secondary_water_resistance | Home must be insured for less than $700,000, located in Florida, and be the homeowner's primary residence. program_name: Florida State Housing Initiatives Partnership (SHIP) Program
description: Florida-funded program distributing housing dollars to all 67 counties and entitlement cities. Each jurisdiction adopts a local housing assistance plan (LHAP) defining eligible activities and award limits.
eligibility_criteria: Owner-occupied required | Income-qualified (≤ 140% AMI) | Eligible projects: disaster_recovery, down_payment, rehab, weatherization | Income-qualified households (very low / low / moderate, up to 140% AMI). program_name: Florida Hometown Heroes Housing Program
description: Down-payment and closing-cost assistance for income-qualified Florida workforce homebuyers (first-time or repeat) earning up to 150% of the local AMI.
eligibility_criteria: Owner-occupied required | Income-qualified (≤ 150% AMI) | Eligible projects: closing_costs, down_payment | Borrower must be employed full-time by a Florida-based employer, occupy the home as primary residence, and complete approved homebuyer education. program_name: Florida Assist (FL Assist) Down-Payment Assistance
description: 0%, deferred-payment second mortgage paired with Florida Housing first mortgage products for income-qualified first-time homebuyers.
eligibility_criteria: Owner-occupied required | Income-qualified | Eligible projects: closing_costs, down_payment | Used in conjunction with a Florida Housing first mortgage. Repayable on sale, refinance, transfer, or when the home is no longer the buyer's primary residence. | Administered by: Florida Housing Finance Corporation

program_name: Florida HFA Preferred and HFA Advantage First Mortgage

incentive_amount: Below-market 30-year fixed-rate first mortgage paired with up to 5% in down-payment assistance.

program_name: Florida Solar and CHP Sales Tax Exemption (Statute 212.08(7)(ccc))

program_name: Florida Net Metering for Customer-Owned Renewable Generation

program_name: Florida Resilient SRF (Wastewater / Stormwater Resilience Loans)

program_name: Florida HOME Investment Partnerships Program

eligibility_criteria: Owner-occupied required | Income-qualified (≤ 80% AMI) | Eligible projects: down_payment, new_construction, rehab | Households at or below 80% AMI. Specific use varies by jurisdiction. | Administered by: Florida Housing Finance Corporation

program_name: Florida CDBG-DR (Community Development Block Grant - Disaster Recovery)

program_name: Florida Home-Buyer Loan Program (HFA First Mortgage Bond Loans)
